escalation.rationale: Russia threatens systematic strikes on Kyiv while Israel launches Operation Arrows of Fire prompting Beirut evacuations amid ongoing US-Iran war.

ticker_items: Russia warns foreigners to leave Kyiv, threatens systematic strikes
Israel launches Operation Arrows of Fire, Beirut evacuations underway
US conducts self-defense strikes in southern Iran
Iran-US peace talks continue in Qatar with frozen funds discussions
Ukraine claims successful defense against Russian territorial advances

eastern_europe.description: Russia fired Oreshnik hypersonic missile and hundreds of drones in massive bombardment of capital
Russian mass barrage of missiles and drones damaged Ukraine's cultural and historical institutions.

middle_east.description: US military conducted self-defense strikes targeting Iranian missile launch sites and boats
Israeli strikes killed 6 Palestinians and injured 8 others across Gaza Strip
US military conducted self-defense strikes in southern Iran.
Israeli army intensified strikes in southern Lebanon as part of Operation Arrows of Fire.
Hezbollah drone strike killed 19-year-old Israeli sergeant in southern Lebanon.

claimed_totals.claim: US-Israel attacks on Iran total deaths
US-Israel attacks on Iran death toll

russia.text: Russia has urged foreign citizens and diplomats to leave Kiev, saying it has planned to launch more strikes against military facilities across the Ukrainian capital
russia.speaker: Russian officials
russia.title: Government statement

russia.text: We are warning foreign citizens, including personnel of diplomatic missions and international organisations, to leave the city as soon as possible
russia.speaker: Russian Foreign Ministry
russia.title: Official Statement

middle_east.text: The United States will either have a good agreement with Iran or deal with the country another way
middle_east.speaker: Marco Rubio
middle_east.title: US Secretary of State

middle_east.text: Iran deal isn't even fully negotiated yet, I won't make bad deals
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

middle_east.text: Iran on Monday reaffirmed its unwavering position in ongoing negotiations to end the third imposed war, with senior officials vowing the Islamic Republic will not yield to US pressure or maximalist demands
middle_east.speaker: Iranian officials
middle_east.title: Government statement

middle_east.text: The European Union was formed in order to screw the United States. That's the purpose of it. And they've done a good job of it. But now I'm the president.
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: Xi Jinping reportedly planning visit to North Korea to revive US denuclearization talks. Reports indicate China secretly trained Russian troops who later fought in Ukraine, despite maintaining appearance of impartiality.
British sailors on standby aboard RFA Lyme Bay for mine-clearing mission in Strait of Hormuz. UK and France leading potential international mine-clearing effort awaiting Iran peace agreement.
Deployed 8,000 troops, fighter squadron, and Chinese air defense system to Saudi Arabia under mutual defense treaty. Deployments began in April enhancing Pakistani military presence in the region.

Hosting high-level Iran-US peace talks in Doha with Iranian Parliament Speaker and Foreign Minister meeting Qatari Prime Minister. Qatar serving as key mediator in efforts to end 12-week US-Israel war against Iran.

Authorities arrested co-owners of two hosting companies for operating IT infrastructure used by Russia for cyberattacks and disinformation campaigns. Seized 800 servers in operation targeting Russian cyber capabilities within EU.

financial.brent_crude: Elevated due to Strait of Hormuz tensions
financial.notes: Gas prices averaging $4.56 per gallon in the US due to Middle East conflicts affecting global energy markets.

update_log.text: Russia threatens systematic strikes on Kyiv, warns foreigners to leave Ukrainian capital immediately
Israel launches Operation Arrows of Fire against Hezbollah, prompting evacuations in Beirut
US military reports conducting self-defense strikes in southern Iran
Iranian officials arrive in Qatar for peace talks with US and frozen funds discussions
Reports of 8 killed in missile and drone attacks across Russian and Ukrainian territory in past 24 hours
Iran's top negotiator and foreign minister meeting Qatar PM in Doha for US talks on potential peace deal
Russia warns foreign diplomats to leave Kiev ahead of planned military facility strikes
Netherlands arrests 2 co-owners of hosting companies aiding Russian cyberattacks, seizes 800 servers
Israeli strikes kill 6 Palestinians and injure 8 others across Gaza Strip
US conducts self-defense strikes on Iranian missile sites amid ceasefire negotiations
Russia fires Oreshnik hypersonic missile in massive bombardment of Kyiv killing 4 and injuring 100
Trump announces potential Iran peace deal progress signaling Strait of Hormuz could reopen soon
Five NATO countries reject proposal for mandatory 0.25% GDP spending on Ukraine military aid
